title: Accurate Boat Recipes
description: A simple Datapack for those who think Minecraft should be more reasonable and accurate
body:
**This content is originally for my modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!**
---
Just a simple data pack for those who think Minecraft should be more reasonable and accurate
Even in Bedrock edition crafting a boat only need one shovel...seriously?
